title: MC Threaded
description: threaded is a set of mod making mincraft use more threads (multi-threading) using c2me and async with other server tps mods like TT20
body:
make mincraft use more of you cpu (for servers) to get better tps **NOT FPS** 


using mods like c2me and async as well as other mods to Attempt to make the game use more cores and threads of your CPU Theoretically offloading chunk ticking and generation as well as entity ticking to other threads and cores making micrafts base tps easier to run for large servers or servers with old lower speed cpu with more then 4 cores for example old E52600 xeons or other old cpus that have low speed but high core counts

**NEEDS JAVA 22 AND AT LEAST A 6 CORE CPU TO RUN AT IT'S BEST**

I may not update this for fps packs look here [hypexly-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hyplexly-optimized)
